{{Infobox character
| name = General Teach
| abilities = {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Tyrfang]]}}
| titles = {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|General}}{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|, Head of the Imperial Guard}}
| affiliations = {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Imperial Guard]]}}
| professions = {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|military leader}}{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|, officer, Guard}}
| appears_in = Elder Empire
| introduced = [[Of Sea and Shadow (novel)|Of Sea and Shadow]]
}}

''See also: [[General Teach Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Jarelys Teach]] is the [[Head of the Imperial Guard]] and a high-ranking General who rose to power through a history of suppressing rebellions. Known for her immense physical strength and intimidating presence, she often wears red-and-black plated armor and carries [[Tyrfang]], a legendary executioner's blade that predates the [[Empire]]. The [[sword]] possesses a dark, noxious power and a heavy [[aura]] of intent that can be felt from a distance. [[Teach]] is characterized by her cold, penetrating gaze and a reputation for being both brutal and fiercely loyal to [[Emperor (Elder Empire)|the Emperor]]. While she has faced internal conflict regarding her past actions against [[Imperial]] citizens, she remains a steadfast protector of the throne, even expressing a willingness to die to signal the loss of [[Emperor (Elder Empire)|the Emperor]]'s sanity. Her appearance includes pale, close-shaved hair and a prominent X-shaped scar on her chest. Throughout various conflicts, she has demonstrated exceptional combat prowess, utilizing a winged [[Kameira]] for travel and displaying the ability to withstand significant physical trauma.}}

== Of Sea and Shadow ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">4</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[General Teach]] is a military leader who uses a [[Windwatcher]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c16">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 16</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[General Teach]] is searching for [[Calder]] and [[Kerian]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c20">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 20</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[General Teach]] has red-and-black-plated arms.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c28">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 28</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[General Teach]] possesses hostile [[Intent]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c28" />}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[General Teach]] is someone [[Emperor (Elder Empire)|the Emperor]] cannot trust with certain details.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c16">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 16</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|General [[Teach]] is a military leader clad in black-and-red armor who wields the [[sword]] [[Tyrfang]]. While moving through a crowd, this armored woman leaves a trail of dark power in her wake. During her campaign, she issued a prediction that the sky would crack within two or three days. Although she permitted [[Calder]] to command the assault on the [[Gray Island]], she eventually sustained wounds that left her in dire condition.}}

<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">9</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[General Teach]] is a figure in black-and-red armor.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c4">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 4</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[General Teach]] is wading through the crowd.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c6">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 6</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[General Teach]] is a woman who uses the [[sword]] [[Tyrfang]].<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c6" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[General Teach]] carries the weapon [[Tyrfang]].<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c10">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 10</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[General Teach]] predicted the sky would crack in two or three days.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c12">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 12</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[General Teach]] is a military leader.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c18">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 18</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[General Teach]] allowed [[Calder]] to lead the assault on the [[Gray Island]].<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c20">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 20</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[General Teach]] is an armored woman who trails dark power.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c20" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[General Teach]] was wounded and in dire condition.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c24">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 24</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Of Darkness and Dawn ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Shera]] spent time with [[General Teach]].<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c16">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 16</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Of Kings and Killers ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|A military leader with pale hair cut close to her scalp, General [[Teach]] serves as the [[Head of the Imperial Guard]] and a loyal soldier to the true [[Emperor (Elder Empire)|Emperor]]. Clad in polished black-and-red armor, she can be contacted through a specialized chain of whistle signals. While acting as an officer waiting at [[Calder]]'s right hand, she engages in combat against [[Estyr Six]]. Although she is a presence [[Calder]] wishes would be by his side, she is seen sleeping and utilizing a specific padlock before eventually joining the battle.}}

<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">10</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[General Teach]] is a woman in polished black-and-red armor who served the true [[Emperor (Elder Empire)|Emperor]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c1">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 1</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[General Teach]] is a military leader with pale hair cut close to her scalp.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c2">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 2</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[General Teach]] can be reached via a chain of signals using whistles.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c2" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[General Teach]] is the [[Head of the Imperial Guard]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c4">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 4</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[General Teach]] is an officer waiting at [[Calder]]'s right hand.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c6">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 6</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[General Teach]] is fighting against [[Estyr Six]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c7">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 7</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[General Teach]] is currently sleeping.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c11">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 11</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[General Teach]] is someone [[Calder]] wishes would be at his side.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c13">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 13</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[General Teach]] uses a specific padlock.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c13" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[General Teach]] joined the battle.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c24">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 24</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Of Killers and Kings ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">4</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[General Teach]] was slammed into the ground by an invisible force.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c8">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 8</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[General Teach]] is a figure [[Shera]] is used to being in the presence of.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c21">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 21</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[General Teach]] wears red-and-black armor and carries [[Tyrfang]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c24">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 24</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[General Teach]] is a Guard.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c24" />}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|“General Teach is on her way here looking for us.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c20" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Of Sea and Shadow]]
[[Category:Of Dawn and Darkness]]
[[Category:Of Kings and Killers]]
[[Category:Of Shadow and Sea]]
[[Category:Of Darkness and Dawn]]
[[Category:Of Killers and Kings]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire characters]]
[[Category:Titled characters]]
